name: pypdfform

metadata.name: PyPDFForm
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: The Python library for PDF forms.

documentation: ## Introduction PyPDFForm is a free and open source pure-Python 3 library for PDF form processing. It contains the essential functionalities needed to interact with PDF forms: * Inspect what data a PDF form needs to be filled with. * Fill a PDF form by simply creating a Python dictionary. * Create a subset of form widgets on a PDF. It also supports other common utilities such as extracting pages and merging multiple PDFs together. ## Installing Install using [pip](https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/): ```shell script pip install PyPDFForm ``` ## Quick Example ![Check out the GitHub repository for a live demo if you can't see it here.](https://github.com/chinapandaman/PyPDFForm/raw/master/demo.gif) A sample PDF form can be found [here](https://github.com/chinapandaman/PyPDFForm/raw/master/pdf_samples/sample_template.pdf). Download it and try: ```python from PyPDFForm import PdfWrapper filled = PdfWrapper("sample_template.pdf").fill( { "test": "test_1", "check": True, "test_2": "test_2", "check_2": False, "test_3": "test_3", "check_3": True, }, ) with open("output.pdf", "wb+") as output: output.write(filled.read()) ``` After running the above code snippet you can find `output.pdf` at the location you specified, and it should look like [this](https://github.com/chinapandaman/PyPDFForm/raw/master/pdf_samples/sample_filled.pdf). ## Documentation The official documentation can be found on [the GitHub page](https://chinapandaman.github.io/PyPDFForm/) of this repository. ## Other Resources [Chicago Python User Group - Dec 14, 2023](https://youtu.be/8t1RdAKwr9w?si=TLgumBNXv9H8szSn)

documentation: Returns true if characters in a text field needs to be formatted into combs.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.get_dropdown_choices

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.get_button_style
documentation: Returns the button style of a checkbox or radiobutton.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.get_char_rect_width
documentation: Returns rectangular width of each character for combed text fields.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.get_character_x_paddings
documentation: Returns paddings between characters for combed text fields.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.split_characters_into_lines
documentation:
Given a long string meant to be filled for a paragraph widget
split by the new line symbol already, splits it further into lines
where each line would fit into the widget's width.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.adjust_each_line
documentation:
Given a list of strings which is the return value of
`split_characters_into_lines`, further adjusts each line
so that there is neither overflow nor over-splitting into
unnecessary lines.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.get_paragraph_lines
documentation: Splits the paragraph field's text to a list of lines.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.get_paragraph_auto_wrap_length
documentation: Calculates the text wrap length of a paragraph field.

functions.name: PyPDFForm.template.update_widget_keys
documentation: Updates a list of keys of widgets.
